title: Support for SAS Software Downloaded from the Campus Software Library
body: This license entitles the user(s) to full Technical Support from SAS as well as free upgrades when new versions are released. For licensing questions or download assistance, please contact licensing@doit.wisc.edu . SAS 9.4 is for 64-bit Operating Systems ONLY. Some of these files are very large and will take a long time to download even on the UW network. Because of their size, we recommend that you do not use a wireless connection to download. New SID files will be posted here when available. For technical support, please contact 919-677-8008 or consult the SAS support page .
